title: 周期回调不及前低
body: 市场处于周期探底阶段。MVRV报1.43，虽低于历史64%时间，但高于上轮同期（2022-06）的1.05。这意味着本轮估值清洗程度不如上轮极端，获利筹码出清并不彻底。当前并未达到历史最悲观的估值位置。中性。底还要磨多久？
title_en: Cyclical pullback hasn't hit previous lows 🔥
body_en: Market is in the cyclical bottom-finding phase. MVRV sits at 1.43. While this is lower than 64% of historical readings, it remains higher than the same period in the last cycle (June 2022) at 1.05. This implies the valuation flush this round hasn't been as extreme, and the clearance of profitable supply is incomplete. We haven't reached historically pessimistic valuation levels yet. Neutral. How much longer to grind this bottom?
